verse.verse_0: In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful.
verse.verse_2: And when the stars fall, scattering,
verse.verse_3: And when the seas are erupted
verse.verse_4: And when the [contents of] graves are scattered,
verse.verse_5: A soul will [then] know what it has put forth and kept back.
verse.verse_6: O mankind, what has deceived you concerning your Lord, the Generous,
verse.verse_7: Who created you, proportioned you, and balanced you?
verse.verse_8: In whatever form He willed has He assembled you.
verse.verse_9: No! But you deny the Recompense.
verse.verse_10: And indeed, [appointed] over you are keepers,
verse.verse_13: Indeed, the righteous will be in pleasure,
verse.verse_14: And indeed, the wicked will be in Hellfire.
verse.verse_15: They will [enter to] burn therein on the Day of Recompense,
verse.verse_16: And never therefrom will they be absent.
verse.verse_17: And what can make you know what is the Day of Recompense?
verse.verse_18: Then, what can make you know what is the Day of Recompense?
verse.verse_19: It is the Day when a soul will not possess for another soul [power to do] a thing; and the command, that Day, is [entirely] with Allah.
